# Kill-Scan — soriza-ai-persona-agency

**Provisional desk-scan.** Every verdict cites the evidence ledger (`E-xxx`); no raw URLs live
here — web facts enter via `evidence-ledger.jsonl` only (grade 4, url required). Disqualifiers
are hard, checkable facts; demand signals are context for customer discovery, never a kill.

## Disqualifier Scan

The only legitimate desk-kill: a hard, checkable fact on one of four axes. A **TRIPPED** row
stops the gate until the founder stamps an override in the decision-log.

| Axis | Verdict | Finding (cites ledger) |
|---|---|---|
| Regulatory wall | PASS | No license needed to run brand-safe AI personas; FTC ad-disclosure is a labeling cost, not a wall [E-002] |
| Technical feasibility | PASS | Off-the-shelf orchestration (LLM + image/voice gen + scheduler) already runs comparable solo AI-creator stacks [E-003] |
| Platform single-point risk | PASS | Distribution spans Instagram / TikTok / YouTube / Fanvue — no single platform is load-bearing; a policy ban is survivable by multi-homing [E-004] |
| Graveyard | PASS | Prior AI-influencer attempts died on adult/NSFW policy bans and parasocial-romance backlash, not on the brand-safe agency model [E-005] |

**No disqualifier tripped.**

## Demand Scan

Unsolved complaints and real-user language mined from public conversations (each a grade-4
ledger entry; the named complainers seed 5a's warm list).

- Solo AI-creator operators say cross-platform posting cadence eats the week — "I spend more time scheduling than creating" [E-006]
- Brands repeatedly ask for "a creator who never goes off-brand" — predictability is the stated pain [E-007]
- Named public complainers (warm-list seeds for 5a): a Reddit r/AIcreators workflow thread and an X thread asking for "an agency model for AI idols" — both publicly asked for exactly this [E-008]

Demand here is context for the interviews, never a kill (size never kills).

## G3 Verdict

**CLEAR** — no disqualifier tripped. Proceed to pressure-test α (`/pressure-test`). The demand
signals and named warm-list seeds carry forward into customer-discovery design (5a).
